# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

Write secure code.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: direct-access
  labels:
    istio-injection: disabled

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-sa
  namespace: direct-access

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: low-latency-service-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: your-registry/low-latency-service:1.0.0
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health/live
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health/ready
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
        env:
        - name: SERVICE_NAME
          value: "low-latency-service"
        - name: LOG_LEVEL
          value: "info"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /app/cache
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: cache
        emptyDir: {}
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchExpressions:
                - key: app
                  operator: In
                  values:
                  - low-latency-service
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: low-latency-service
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database-client-sa
  namespace: direct-access

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-client
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: database-client
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-client
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-client
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database-client-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1001
        fsGroup: 1001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: your-registry/database-client:1.0.0
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
          name: metrics
          protocol: TCP
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1001
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 9090
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 9090
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
        env:
        - name: DB_HOST
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: database-credentials
              key: host
        - name: DB_PORT
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: database-credentials
              key: port
        - name: DB_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: database-credentials
              key: username
        - name: DB_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: database-credentials
              key: password
        - name: CONNECTION_POOL_SIZE
          value: "50"
        - name: CONNECTION_TIMEOUT
          value: "5000"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: app-data
          mountPath: /app/data
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: app-data
        emptyDir: {}

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-client
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: database-client
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: database-client
  ports:
  - name: metrics
    port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: cache-service-sa
  namespace: direct-access

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: cache-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cache-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: cache-service-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 999
        fsGroup: 999
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: your-registry/cache-service:1.0.0
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          name: redis
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 8081
          name: admin
          protocol: TCP
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 999
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
        livenessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 6379
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 6379
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
        env:
        - name: REDIS_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: cache-credentials
              key: password
        - name: MAX_MEMORY
          value: "1gb"
        - name: MAX_MEMORY_POLICY
          value: "allkeys-lru"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: data
          mountPath: /data
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
      - name: data
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - labelSelector:
              matchExpressions:
              - key: app
                operator: In
                values:
                - cache-service
            topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: cache-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: cache-service
  ports:
  - name: redis
    port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
    protocol: TCP
  - name: admin
    port: 8081
    targetPort: 8081
    protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: udp-service-sa
  namespace: direct-access

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: udp-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: udp-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: udp-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: udp-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: udp-service-sa
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1002
        fsGroup: 1002
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: your-registry/udp-service:1.0.0
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5000
          name: udp
          protocol: UDP
        - containerPort: 8082
          name: health
          protocol: TCP
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1002
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8082
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 15
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8082
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
        env:
        - name: UDP_PORT
          value: "5000"
        - name: BUFFER_SIZE
          value: "65536"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: udp-service
  namespace: direct-access
  labels:
    app: udp-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: udp-service
  ports:
  - name: udp
    port: 5000
    targetPort: 5000
    protocol: UDP
  - name: health
    port: 8082
    targetPort: 8082
    protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-pdb
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service

---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: cache-service-pdb
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-service

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: direct-access-network-policy
  namespace: direct-access
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: direct-access
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: trusted-namespace
  egress:
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: direct-access
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 443
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 5432
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 3306
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 6379

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: database-credentials
  namespace: direct-access
type: Opaque
stringData:
  host: "database.example.com"
  port: "5432"
  username: "dbuser"
  password: "CHANGE_ME_SECURE_PASSWORD"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: cache-credentials
  namespace: direct-access
type: Opaque
stringData:
  password: "CHANGE_ME_CACHE_PASSWORD"
